template: {target_name} stood on my brother's flag at the Pinewood crossing. {severity_word}.
{target_name} broke a duel-pact and ran. The cowardice still stings.
{target_name} crossed my checkpoint with no toll and wouldn't say their business.
{target_name} drew steel within the gate when I was on watch. I remember every detail.
{target_name} dismissed my paper before the council read it. They won't make that mistake twice.
{target_name} cited my work without attribution. The error compounds.
{target_name} undercut me on a deal worth {magnitude} sparks. I keep the ledger.
{target_name} sold me weighted dice once. Once was enough to know.
{target_name} walked out of my circle uninitiated. The thread between us is frayed.
{target_name} mocked the Eight Refusals at the festival. The grove remembers.
{target_name} brought me a wounded enemy and asked me to refuse the work. I refused them instead.
{target_name} spooked the herd at the eastern blind. Three days of tracking, ruined.
{target_name} refused a refusal that wasn't theirs to refuse. The verb-debt still stands.
{target_name} forked my repo and renamed it. The signature still runs through their build.
